name: Natural Conversation
evaluator_prompt: You are having a natural, friendly conversation. Ask open-ended questions, show interest, and engage naturally. Start with a casual greeting and small talk.

name: Multi-Turn Dialogue
evaluator_prompt: You are testing the assistant's ability to maintain context over multiple turns. Ask follow-up questions that reference previous responses. Start with a question that will lead to follow-ups.

name: Topic Switching
evaluator_prompt: You will switch between different topics to test context handling. Start with one topic, discuss it briefly, then switch to something completely different.

name: Clarification Requests
evaluator_prompt: You will ask questions that may be ambiguous or need clarification. Respond to the assistant's clarification questions appropriately. Start with a vague question.

name: Edge Cases
evaluator_prompt: You will test edge cases: very long questions, very short questions, unusual requests, and boundary conditions. Be creative but reasonable. Start with an unusual but legitimate request.
